name: Override Unit (Optional)
helpText: Leave empty to use mode default. Supports CO₂ subscript.

name: Input Value Divider
helpText: Divide raw telemetry value by this number before display.

name: Auto-Scale Units
helpText: Automatically scale units (e.g. kg→t→kt, L→kL→ML) based on value magnitude.

name: Show Delta vs Target
helpText: Show ▲/▼ percentage change vs a target (2nd data series).

name: Show Status Badge
helpText: Show a threshold-based status indicator (On Track / Warning / Critical).

name: Warning Threshold
helpText: Value below (or above if inverted) which status becomes Warning. Leave empty for mode default.

name: Critical Threshold
helpText: Value below (or above if inverted) which status becomes Critical. Leave empty for mode default.

name: Invert Threshold Logic
helpText: When ON, lower values are better (e.g. emissions). When OFF, higher values are better (e.g. renewable %).

name: Tooltip Content
helpText: Hover tooltip text. Leave empty to use mode default.

name: Custom Accent Color (Optional)
helpText: Override mode theme color, e.g. #FF6B35. Leave empty for automatic.
